name: Porter

unions.name: Model
unions.comment: Porter model, used to keep track of response handlers.

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment: Porter configuration, containing ports and message encoders/decoders.
aliases.type: { outgoingPort : Value -> Cmd msg, incomingPort : (Value -> Msg req res msg) -> Sub (Msg req res msg), encodeRequest : req -> Value, decodeResponse : Decoder res }

values.name: send
values.type: (res -> msg) -> req -> Cmd (Msg req res msg)

values.name: subscriptions
values.type: Config req res msg -> Sub (Msg req res msg)

values.name: update
values.comment: Update port model based on local messages. Returns a new port model and a local command that must be mapped to the parent message.
values.type: Config req res msg -> Msg req res msg -> Model req res msg -> ( Model req res msg, Cmd msg )
